ModMetaData.name: Body Fortification Hediff
ModMetaData.author: justty32
ModMetaData.description:
Adds a special hediff "Body Fortification" that multiplies all body part hit points by 2×, 5×, or 10× depending on severity level. Applied via Harmony patch on DamageWorker_AddInjury.
增加特殊 hediff「身體強化」，依 severity 等級（輕度 ×2 / 中度 ×5 / 極限 ×10）讓所有部位耐久度倍增。透過 Harmony patch 實作。
Requires Harmony.
